text.title: roadmap-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for roadmap-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Feature list with hard delivery dates shared externally.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Customers interpret dates as commitments. When dates slip — and they always do — trust erodes. Use abstracted time horizons ("H1 2026") or capability descriptions with no dates for external sharing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confidence inflation means the signal is meaningless. Calibrate against the past quarter: if you delivered 60% of "high" items, label the rest "medium." Stakeholders will notice the discrepancy if you don't.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a cull policy "Later" becomes a graveyard that discredits the whole roadmap. Cap at 8 items and run one quarterly cull pass; items that survive 3 culls without moving to Now/Next should be dropped or converted into discovery work.

failure-mode.description: Same roadmap artifact shared with all audiences (engineering, customers, executives, sales).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Engineering needs dependencies and confidence; customers need capability descriptions; executives need objective linkage. One artifact leaks too much or too little to each. Generate two versions from one source.

failure-mode.description: Initiatives on the roadmap not linked to any stated objective.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unanchored initiatives cannot be prioritized or defended. If an initiative does not drive a stated OKR or goal, ask why it is on the roadmap before adding it.

failure-mode.description: Roadmap never updated between quarterly rewrites.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Monthly reviews catch reality drift before it compounds. A roadmap that was accurate in January and reviewed in April has three months of silent divergence baked in — the team loses trust that the document reflects reality.
